title: Netflix, Disney and YouTube interested in FIFA World Cup U.S. rights; package could reach $2 billion
summary_full: FIFA has alerted media companies that English- and Spanish-language U.S. rights are likely to be sold together for 2030 and 2034, likely driving up the price.
summary_public: FIFA has alerted media companies that English- and Spanish-language U.S. rights are likely to be sold together for 2030 and 2034, likely driving up the price.
